perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an anime-style 2D animated sequence showing a school building and cherry blossoms, followed by title text. (2) The scene transitions to a real-life set on a couch where several plush dolls (a blue bat, two beige figures) are positioned as characters in a dorm. (3) A new human-like plush doll with black hair and a blue jacket is introduced into the scene. (4) Human hands enter the frame to manipulate the dolls, specifically removing the jacket of the new doll to show a feature. (5) A small plastic student ID card is placed in front of the doll. (6) The final phase transitions to a high-quality product showcase with the plush doll rotating against a stylized background with floating text and pricing info.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Japanese narration starts over an upbeat anime theme song. (2) The soundscape shifts to Mandarin Chinese dialogue with distinct character voices: a deep, authoritative voice for the blue doll and a gentler voice for the new doll. (3) Periodic cartoon sound effects (pops, magic sparkles) are used for comedic emphasis. (4) The final segment features a melodic Mandopop style background track with a clear male voiceover describing product specifications and price.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 阿啾小劇場 (Functional: Series Title). (2) 轉學生登場！ (Decorative: Hook text meaning 'Transfer student appears!'). (3) 學生宿舍 (Functional: Location label). (4) Shawn學長 生日紀念絨毛娃娃 (Functional: Product name). (5) NT$ 800 (Functional: Price). (6) 附學生證(雙面) (Functional: Product feature detail).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Character Skit -> Product Reveal -> Feature Showcase -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 4 main plush doll characters; human hands appear occasionally to move the toys.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A plush doll representing 'Shawn學長' with messy black hair, red eyes, wearing a red shirt and blue hooded jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initially a gray fabric couch with a small whiteboard; later a vibrant pink and white commercial graphic background.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Spring (implied by cherry blossoms in intro)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comedic Skit -> Feature Demo -> Promotional Close
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a creative marketing tool to launch a limited edition plush doll for the 'Shawn' character. It utilizes the creator's established 'Mini Theater' comedy format to maintain viewer engagement through a narrative skit before pivoting to a direct commercial pitch highlighting price and specific product features like removable clothing and included ID card.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product name, pricing, and availability details in the second half of the video.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of the '阿啾小劇場' branding and specific plushie character designs recognizable to the creator's fanbase.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges digital content with physical merchandise by giving the product a personality through the skit.
